name: Yahoo! Inc.
description: Yahoo Inc. is a global media and technology company that serves as a trusted guide for hundreds of millions of users worldwide. For over 30 years, the company has provided a diverse portfolio of iconic digital products and services, including search, finance, sports, and mail. Beyond its consumer-facing platforms, Yahoo offers sophisticated omnichannel advertising solutions and data-driven tools that help partners and advertisers reach their target audiences effectively. Headquartered in the United States, Yahoo continues to evolve its technology to connect people with the information and content they value most in an ever-changing digital landscape.
